    Index

    A B C D F G I L M N R S T U V Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    acceptPayment() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Accepts payment from the user until the selected item's price has been met or the transaction is cancelled.

    B

    BILLS - Static variable in class VM.C
    Philippine bill and coin denominations supported by the vending machine.

    C

    C - Class in VM
    Utility class containing constants used throughout the vending machine application, including formatting values, ANSI color codes, and supported bill and coin denominations.
    C() - Constructor for class VM.C
     
    cleanup() - Static method in class VM.Tools
    Closes the scanner used for reading console input.
    collectMoney() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Displays the total value of the bills and coins received since the last collection and clears the machine's recorded payment history.

    D

    decreaseStock() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Decreases the stock by one and records the sale of the item.
    DEF - Static variable in class VM.C
    ANSI escape code that resets the console text formatting.
    dispenseItem() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Dispenses the selected item if it is available and the payment is valid.
    DRINKS - Static variable in class Items.FoodStuff
     

    F

    FoodStuff - Class in Items
     
    FoodStuff() - Constructor for class Items.FoodStuff
     

    G

    getBillType(int) - Static method in class VM.Tools
    Returns the type of the specified denomination based on its index in C.BILLS.
    getCalories() - Method in class Items.Item
    Returns the calorie count of the item.
    getFoodList(int) - Static method in class Items.FoodStuff
     
    getInitialStock() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Returns the stock level immediately after the most recent restocking.
    getInsertedBills() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Returns the bills and coins inserted during the current transaction.
    getItem() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Returns the item assigned to this slot.
    getName() - Method in class Items.Item
    Returns the name of the item.
    getPrice() - Method in class Items.Item
    Returns the selling price of the item.
    getStock() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Returns the current stock of the item.
    getType() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Returns the name of the vending machine's selected type.
    GRY - Static variable in class VM.C
    ANSI escape code for yellow console text.

    I

    isFull() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Determines whether the slot is fully stocked.
    Item - Class in Items
    Represents an item that can be stored and sold by the vending machine.
    Item(String, double, int) - Constructor for class Items.Item
    Constructs an item with the specified name, price, and calorie count.
    itemAvailable() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Determines whether the slot contains at least one item.
    Items - package Items
     

    L

    LINE - Static variable in class VM.C
    Default width used when printing horizontal separator lines.

    M

    mainMenu() - Static method in class Navigation
    Displays the application's main menu and directs the user to create, test, or exit the vending machine program.

    N

    Navigation - Class in Unnamed Package
    Provides the menu-driven interface for interacting with the vending machine application.
    Navigation() - Constructor for class Navigation
     
    nonNegDouble() - Static method in class VM.Tools
    Prompts the user for a non-negative decimal value.
    nonNegInt() - Static method in class VM.Tools
    Prompts the user for a non-negative integer.

    R

    rangeInput(int, int) - Static method in class VM.Tools
    Prompts the user for an integer within the specified inclusive range.
    RED - Static variable in class VM.C
    ANSI escape code for red console text.
    replenishCashReserves() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Replenishes the machine's cash reserves by allowing the user to specify the quantity of each supported bill and coin denomination.
    restockItems() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Allows the user to restock selected items by specifying the quantity to add.
    returnChange(ArrayList) - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Returns the specified bills and coins to the user and displays the total amount returned.

    S

    SCAN - Static variable in class VM.Tools
    The scanner used for reading user input in the console.
    selectItem() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Prompts the user to select an item from the machine.
    setItemPrices() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Allows the user to update the price of selected items.
    setPrice(double) - Method in class Items.Item
    Sets the selling price of the item.
    setStock(int) - Method in class VM.Slot
    Adds the specified quantity to the current stock.
    Slot - Class in VM
    Represents a slot in the vending machine that stores a single type of item.
    Slot(Item, int) - Constructor for class VM.Slot
    Constructs a slot with the specified item and capacity.
    SNACKS - Static variable in class Items.FoodStuff
     
    sumBills(ArrayList) - Static method in class VM.Tools
    Calculates the total value of the specified denominations and displays each denomination and its corresponding type.

    T

    Tools - Class in VM
    Utility class that provides static helper methods for user input, input validation, and common vending machine operations.
    Tools() - Constructor for class VM.Tools
     

    U

    updateInitialStock() - Method in class VM.Slot
    Updates the recorded initial stock to match the current stock.

    V

    VendingMachine - Class in VM
    Represents a vending machine that manages item slots, cash reserves, and vending operations.
    VendingMachine() - Constructor for class VM.VendingMachine
    Constructs a vending machine by prompting the user to select a machine type and initialize its cash reserves.
    viewTransactionSummary() - Method in class VM.VendingMachine
    Displays a summary of item transactions, including each item's starting inventory, quantity sold, remaining stock, and the machine's total sales.
    VM - package VM
     

    Y

    YEL - Static variable in class VM.C
    ANSI escape code for yellow console text.
